name: PRINCESS_UMANDA
description: An easy and simple WhatsApp bot developed by Mahiya boy

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Your contact status will be read automatically(type yes to active or no to deactive ; don't write in capital letter)

AUTO_DOWNLOAD_STATUS.description: Your contact status will be downloaded automatically and sent to you(type yes to active or no to deactive ; don't write in capital letter)

PM_PERMIT.description: Other user can't use your bot in pm (type yes to active or no to deactive ; don't write in capital letter)

BOT_NAME.description: put A name for your bot

BOT_MENU_LINKS.description: add one or many link for your bot menu ; eg : url1,url2,url3.....

PUBLIC_MODE.description: type yes to put your bot on public mode or no to put it on private mod

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: insert your heroku api-key (this is optional)

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: insert your heroku APP NAME (this is optional)

SESSION_ID.description: put your session ID , make sure it starts with eyJub2I...

OWNER_NUMBER.desc: Your number , dont put '+' and put your area code(example of Togo '228')

WARN_COUNT.desc: this is the limit of warn for warning commands

STARTING_BOT_MESSAGE.description: if you don't want starting-bot-message put no else put yes

PRESENCE.description: 1 always online, 2 Auto typing always, 3 Recording audio.... always type choice number 📌
